title: MinerU 2.5 Pro PDF Parser
description: Serverless PDF → Markdown / JSON via MinerU. 3.1.x runtime running the MinerU2.5-Pro-2604-1.2B VLM. Also accepts images (PNG/JPEG/GIF/BMP/TIFF/WebP), DOCX, PPTX, and XLSX. Scales to zero with a 10 s idle window, ~$0.0001 per page on AMPERE_24. Five MinerU backends (pipeline / vlm-auto / vlm-http-client / hybrid-auto / hybrid-http-client), three input transports (URL / base64 / mounted volume), two output formats (gzipped tarball / inline). Generic document-parsing primitive for RAG and document-context systems.
